en.extract:
The Palau nightjar (Caprimulgus phalaena) is a species of nightjar endemic to Palau.  It was formerly considered a subspecies of the grey nightjar.

The '''Palau nightjar''' ('''''Caprimulgus phalaena''''') is a [[species]] of [[nightjar]] endemic to [[Palau]].  It was formerly considered a subspecies of the [[grey nightjar]].
